itinerary.title: Premium Hills of Mizoram Family Getaway
itinerary.tagline: Aizawl Peaks • Scenic Mountain Trails • Cultural Heritage • Family Bonding Landscapes
itinerary.overview:
TRAGUIN PREMIUM HILLS OF MIZORAM FAMILY GETAWAY — Aizawl Peaks • Scenic Mountain Trails • Cultural Heritage • Family Bonding Landscapes. 05 Nights / 06 Days Relaxing Hills of Mizoram Family Sojourn.

TOUR OVERVIEW
Escape to the serene, mist-covered hills of Mizoram with this TRAGUIN curated family getaway. Designed to offer a perfect mix of cultural discovery and peaceful mountain leisure, this Hills of Mizoram itinerary ensures your family enjoys premium stays, comfortable exploration, and unforgettable memories in Northeast India's most scenic landscape.
itinerary.seo_title: MZ-007 | Premium Hills of Mizoram Family Getaway | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 05 Nights / 06 Days Mizoram package (MZ-007 / TRG-MIZ-HLS-2026): Aizawl Peaks • Scenic Mountain Trails • Cultural Heritage • Family Bonding Landscapes with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

highlights.text: Day 01: ARRIVAL IN AIZAWL & MOUNTAIN WELCOME
TRAGUIN curated Premium Hills of Mizoram Family Getaway with handpicked premium stays
Vehicle / Meals: Luxury SUV / MAPAI (Breakfast & Dinner)

days.title: ARRIVAL IN AIZAWL & MOUNTAIN WELCOME
days.description: Arrive in Aizawl, the capital of Mizoram. Private transfer to your handpicked premium resort. Enjoy a quiet evening with spectacular panoramic views of the hills.
activities: Quiet evening with panoramic hill views.

days.title: AIZAWL CULTURAL DISCOVERY
days.description: Explore the cultural highlights of Aizawl at a family-friendly pace. Visit museums and local heritage centres, learning about Mizo traditions and iconic attractions.
activities: Museums and heritage centres — Mizo traditions.

days.title: SCENIC HILL STATION EXCURSION
days.description: A relaxing drive through the stunning mountain vistas. Visit heritage viewpoints and enjoy the fresh mountain air, capturing breathtaking landscapes together.

days.title: VALLEY VISTAS & FAMILY BONDING
days.description: Spend a peaceful day enjoying the scenic beauty of local valleys, visiting quiet parks, and sharing quality time in the tranquil Mizo hillside.
activities: Scenic valley beauty and quiet parks.
Quality family time in tranquil hillside.

days.title: LOCAL CRAFTS & FAREWELL DINNER
days.description: Discover local arts and crafts, pick up unique souvenirs, and celebrate your final evening with a grand family farewell dinner, creating unforgettable memories.
activities: Meals Included: MAPAI Breakfast & Farewell Dinner

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium Mizoram family getaway.

inclusions.text: Premium Stays: 5 Nights in handpicked Mizoram properties as per chosen category.
Luxury Transportation: Private dedicated Luxury SUV for all transfers and sightseeing.
Curated Meal Plan: MAPAI — daily breakfast and dinner at handpicked venues.
TRAGUIN Support: 24/7 dedicated guest experience manager on call.
Private Transfers: Airport/railway arrival and departure transfers in premium AC vehicle.
Handpicked Stays: TRAGUIN-vetted accommodations matching your selected tier.
All applicable taxes, driver allowances, tolls, and parking charges for the private vehicle.
Family-friendly sightseeing with cultural discovery and scenic mountain leisure throughout.
Airfare, domestic flight bookings, or train tickets.
Monument entry tickets, camera permits, or sanctuary entry fees.

Travel insurance, medical expenses, and any emergency evacuation costs.
